form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.70) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed eight times. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a half a length third (16.89) over 300m at this track. Thereabouts recently and definitely worth including.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when fourth (19.58) at this track at last run and returns here after a 11 weeks break. Has a win and two minors from four fresh up runs. Tough line-up and place prospects appear best.
